sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root יָרֵא)-

(1) fear. Gen 9:2, מֹורַאֲכֶם “the fear of you.” Deu 11:25 also, reverence, Mal 1:6.

(2) that which is feared or reverenced, specially spoken of God (compare פַּחַד), Isa 8:12, 13 Psa 76:12.

(3) a stupendous or wonderful deed, Deu 26:8 34:12 Jer 32:21. Pl. מֹורָאִים Deu 4:34.
